Comment: AWSops v2 ADR-032 sibling incident state machine. Autonomous incident LIFECYCLE — ships flag-OFF; nothing starts an execution unless incident_lifecycle_enabled provisions the dispatcher INCIDENT_STATE_MACHINE_ARN. Stage progression: Triage -> (Choice on $.decision: Skipped/Linked -> Done; New -> Lead) -> Investigation (Map over $.roster, MaxConcurrency.$ = the Lead-resolved fan-out cap; each item a read-only Sub-agent consult; per-item Catch continues) -> RootCause -> MitigationPlan -> Prevention -> Done. SAFETY: the Lead DELEGATES ONLY and the Sub-agents are recommendation-only — NO state in this SM performs an AWS mutation / runTask / remediation call. Idempotent: execution name == job_id (set by the dispatcher). Every stage Task Catches States.ALL -> StageFailed, which marks the running stage failed (incident_stage_failed) then terminalizes the worker_jobs row via the reused P2 status_updater (SFN cannot write VPC Aurora) -> Fail. job_id + incident_id are preserved across stages via ResultPath so the failure path always has them.

Triage.Comment: Severity gate + correlation dedup. Returns {job_id, incident_id, decision, maxConcurrency?}. Output replaces input (carries job_id + incident_id forward).

TriageDecision.Comment: Skipped (below min-severity) and Linked (deduped into an existing incident) terminate cleanly — no roster, no investigation. Only a New incident proceeds to the Lead.

AlertValidation.Comment: W2 Haiku true/false-alert gate (read-only). Returns {verdict, confidence, decision}. ResultPath isolates the output so top-level job_id + incident_id survive for Lead and the failure path. NO mutation.

ValidationDecision.Comment: Only a high-confidence false_positive (under the suppression-safety gate, enforce-mode) suppresses; everything else (incl. uncertain, shadow mode, critical) escalates to the Lead.

Suppressed.Comment: Validated false_positive — suppressed (no investigation/RCA). Read-only outcome; the verdict is already recorded in incidents.validation.

Lead.Comment: DELEGATES ONLY. Returns {job_id, incident_id, roster:[...], maxConcurrency}. No agent invoke, no mutation. Output replaces input (still carries job_id + incident_id).

Investigation.Comment: Fan-out to the Lead-resolved read-only Sub-agents. MaxConcurrency.$ == the Lead's maxConcurrency (already capped by the configurable subagent-fanout-max). Each item is a recommendation-only consult that writes ONE incident_findings row. Per-item Catch continues so one Sub-agent failure never stalls the incident. ResultPath isolates the Map output so the top-level job_id + incident_id survive for RootCause and the failure path.

SubAgent.Comment: One roster item -> one read-only section consult -> one compacted incident_findings row. Idempotent on the stage idempotency key. Recommendation-only (no mutation).

SubAgentSkipped.Comment: A single Sub-agent failing is non-fatal (its findings row is simply absent). Continue the Map.

RootCause.Comment: Reads the recorded findings from Aurora and persists incidents.rca. ResultPath preserves the top-level job_id + incident_id (this Lambda's return omits job_id).

MitigationPlan.Comment: RECOMMENDATION-ONLY mitigation plan (names known catalog actions; never executes them). ResultPath preserves job_id + incident_id.

Prevention.Comment: Records preventive recommendations. ResultPath preserves job_id + incident_id.

StageFailed.Comment: Marks the running incident_stages row failed (terminal-immutable) + rolls incidents.status='stalled'. Input carries {job_id, incident_id, errorInfo}; ResultPath isolates the marker so job_id survives for the status_updater. NO mutation of AWS resources.

MarkJobFailed.Comment: Reused P2 status_updater terminalizes the worker_jobs row (SFN cannot write VPC Aurora). Retry hard so a transient blip does not leave the job stuck 'running' until the reaper. No Catch by design.

IncidentFailed.Cause: Incident stage failed; incident_stage_failed marked the stage and status_updater terminalized the job.
